feedback.text: I welcome the objectives of the Digital Fairness Act, but I would like to emphasize the importance of protecting consumers from unilateral changes to existing contracts. Companies should not be allowed to alter the terms of purchase in a way that transforms bought products, such as video games, into mere licenses. As a consumer, I want to own the product I purchase, not just acquire a license to use it. True ownership should remain a protected right in the digital market.
